heading: Right of priority for request for extension of protection to the United States
label: 1141g Right of priority for request for extension of protection to the United States

children.text: the request for extension of protection contains a claim of priority; and

the date of international registration or the date of the recordal of the request for extension of protection to the United States is not later than 6 months after the date of the first regular national filing (within the meaning of Article 4(A)(3) of the Paris Convention for the Protection of Industrial Property) or a subsequent application (within the meaning of Article 4(C)(4) of the Paris Convention for the Protection of Industrial Property).
